score_scale.serverless_score: 0=central service; 5=no privileged host or matching server

strict_true_p2p_reference.name: Bisq
strict_true_p2p_reference.note: Reference model outside the DeFiLlama top-100: desktop clients trade directly over a P2P network, with no central website or order server.
